name: source
title: Source
description: Composable source link preview for AI citations.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import { HoverCard } from "$COMPONENTS$/ui/hover-card/index.js";
	import { SourceClass, setSourceContext } from "./context.svelte.js";
	import type { Snippet } from "svelte";

	let {
		href,
		children
	}: {
		href: string;
		children: Snippet;
	} = $props();

	const contextInstance = new SourceClass({ href });
	setSourceContext(contextInstance);
</script>

<HoverCard openDelay={150} closeDelay={0}>
	{@render children()}
</HoverCard>
{#if showFavicon} {/if} {labelToShow}

{displayDomain}
{title}
{description}
